title: Design a clean landing screen using the Tessera brand: a hero with a headline, …
summary: Tessera landing hero approved as-is and handed to the factory; a worker will build it at /tessera/, and future screens inherit the Tessera brand automatically
carriedContext: Tessera landing hero approved as-is and handed to the factory; a worker will build it at /tessera/, and future screens inherit the Tessera brand automatically
